title: bursera bicolor
intro: Bursera bicolor, also known as the two-colored copal tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Burseraceae, native to the tropical regions of Central America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Bursera bicolor include reducing inflammation and relieving pain, as well as treating skin conditions such as acne and eczema. In herbal preparations, the plant's resin can be extracted and used to make ointments, salves, and other topical applications to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
